metadata.description: Curated collection of reusable patterns for bootstrapping projects with Claude Code

plugins.name: bootstrap-docs
plugins.description: Set up a comprehensive, AI-readable documentation strategy in any project

plugins.name: implement-lifecycle
plugins.description: Full implementation lifecycle with adversarial PR review — plan, implement, PR, review/address loop, merge

plugins.name: bootstrap-worktrees
plugins.description: Set up project-agnostic worktree isolation with per-worktree ports, Docker Compose projects, and config files
